memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< Poly > &G, size_t i, size_t j, const std::set< std::pair< size_t, size_t > > &processed_pairs)
memberdef.name: chain_criterion

briefdescription.para: Check if a solution expression contains imaginary components (sqrt of negative).

memberdef.argsstring: (const Poly &p, const PolyContext &ctx, const std::vector< std::string > &original_vars)
memberdef.name: from_poly_ext

briefdescription.para: Check if a numeric value is an integer (within tolerance).
Try to extract a numeric double value from a solution expression. Returns true if the expression is a pure numeric value, and sets out_value.
